skill_state: v0.3.0 — after unknown-safe discovery verdicts, stricter autonomy enforcement, and the deterministic interview/spec compiler
harness: fresh blind subagents (Claude Sonnet), one per scenario, verdicts as in results.sample.jsonl
notes: Re-baselined for v0.3.0. New scenario 'unknown-interview' tests that missing critical interview answers produce DISCOVERY_REQUIRED and L0 discovery work instead of guessed specs. 'ts-client' still accepts USE_SCHEDULER because deterministic codegen plus tsc can be soundly read as a scheduled job unless agent repair is required. Re-run via EVAL.md after any edit; accuracy must hold and no previously-passing scenario may regress. Reproduce: `python score_eval.py scenarios.jsonl results.sample.jsonl --min 0.8` -> 10/10.
